profile.description1:
Web full-stack developer, based near Paris.
I regularly create sites and tools in my spare time. My personal projects are presented on this page.

experience.name: Full-Stack Developer at
experience.description:
• Redesign of the website and CMS using Symfony 7.
  • Creation of tools to automate the implementation of promotional offers.
  • Implementation of a purchase journey for the launch of a new product.
  • Maintenance and continuous evolution of interfaces to ensure stability and security.

experience.name: Full-Stack Developer at
experience.description:
• Development of an activity report (CRA) for tracking budgets and project progress.
  • Design of a back-office for project and user management.
  • Creation of data visualization pages with data export and email notifications.
  • Integration of Azure SSO (SAML 2.0, OAuth 2.0).

training.name: Master's degree in Innovative Project Management at
training.description: Skills in needs analysis, design of custom web architectures, participatory management, and innovative project management with a CSR approach.

training.name: Bachelor's degree in Digital Project Management at
training.description: Specialization in web development. Proficiency in project management, website design and development, user interface creation, and digital communication strategy.

training.name: Scientific Baccalaureate
training.description: Specialization in Computer and Digital Sciences (ISN).
